query:
SELECT 
  e.id AS employee_id,
  CONCAT(e.first_name, ' ', e.last_name) AS full_name,
  e.shift,
  e.seniority_date,
  r.working_priority,
  r.priority AS sr_priority,
  DATE_FORMAT(rdd.date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS decision_date
FROM request_date_decisions rdd
JOIN requests r ON r.id = rdd.request_id
JOIN employees e ON e.id = r.employee_id
WHERE rdd.decision = 'approved'
  AND rdd.date >= '2026-07-01'
  AND rdd.date <= '2026-12-31'
  AND e.is_active = 1
  AND e.role != 'ancillary'
ORDER BY e.shift, e.seniority_date, e.last_name, rdd.date;

  e.shift,

  DATE_FORMAT(rdd.date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS decision_date
FROM request_date_decisions rdd
JOIN requests r ON r.id = rdd.request_id
JOIN employees e ON e.id = r.employee_id
WHERE rdd.decision = 'approved'
  AND rdd.date >= '2026-07-01'
  AND rdd.date <= '2026-12-31'
  AND e.is_active = 1

ORDER BY e.shift, e.seniority_date, e.last_name, rdd.date;
